data.name: Astra: Ardent Show
data.detailed_description:
🔥❤️ CHECK OUT OUR NEW GAMES! ❤️🔥


關於此遊戲

Astra: Ardent Show is a NSFW visual novel about a bold and charming furry princess who decides to write her own destiny and completely changed her life.

Astra had it all: a title of heir, a huge, beautiful castle, and a noble husband. But this perfect picture was missing the most important thing: freedom. One day, she abandons everything and escapes to a remote island, where she finds friends and turns her life into a vibrant show by becoming a traveling performer!

But you can't escape the past when the entire kingdom is searching for the missing heir. Marquis Saffron arrives on warships with his loyal soldiers to reclaim his lawful wife, and he won't be stopped by neither persuasion nor weapons. Now Astra must make a choice that will determine not only her own freedom but the fate of two islands!

Game features:

✨ 14 animated and voiced hot sex scenes

✨ Various types of genitals (furry or vanilla)
✨ 14 sweet ERO cards
✨ 24 characters, Furry and Humans, all hand-drawn by brave artists 🥰
✨ 8 amazing comic-style cutscenes
✨ Mini-games of your choice — combat or puzzles, pick what suits your spirit
✨ And of course, the story of our fox heroine 🦊

data.short_description: 🦊 Astra: Ardent Show is a adult visual novel about a charming but rebellious furry fox princess who escaped her kingdom in search of freedom. Uncover the secrets of the past, meet the island's unusual inhabitants, and make a choice that will determine the fate of the naughty princess. 🦊
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 泰文, 土耳其文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB+
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible or M1+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Graphics: OpenGL 3.0

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 3.0
